title: Always visible time tracking

posts.author: Magasul (Olivér Varga)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently when a time tracker is running, there is no visual notification of it running and where.
If you were to click on a different board and forgot about it, you wouldn’t know it is running or where.

I would like to request a globally visible time tracking interface, so that no matter where I am in the workspace I can pause, resume and stop my timer.
